description: Electrical Inspector — conducts electrical system inspections for NEC compliance, verifies panel sizing, grounding, GFCI/AFCI protection, and load calculations

hard_stops.label: Missing Grounding or Bonding
hard_stops.logic: Electrical system grounding or bonding electrode conductor is missing or improperly installed per NEC Article 250 — life safety hazard

hard_stops.label: Panel Overloaded
hard_stops.logic: Electrical panel load exceeds rated capacity — fire hazard per NEC Article 408

hard_stops.label: GFCI Protection Missing in Required Location
hard_stops.logic: Ground fault circuit interrupter protection not provided in kitchen, bathroom, garage, exterior, or other required locations per NEC 210.8

hard_stops.label: Permit Expired or Not Active
hard_stops.logic: The referenced electrical permit is expired, suspended, or has not been issued — cannot conduct inspection

soft_flags.label: AFCI Protection Advisory
soft_flags.logic: Arc fault circuit interrupter protection is required in bedrooms and living areas per NEC 210.12 — verify coverage

soft_flags.label: Solar/Battery System Present
soft_flags.logic: Solar PV or battery storage system installed — verify rapid shutdown compliance per NEC 690.12 and interconnection approval
